task: T27 - Message soft-delete API + WS notification

changes.description: Added delete_message handler (DELETE /api/messages/{message_id}) and 7 integration tests
Added delete route import and /messages/{message_id} route
Added delete route import and /messages/{message_id} route in api_routes()

handler.behavior: Soft-deletes message by setting deleted_at = unixepoch(). Only sender can delete. Returns 204. Broadcasts MsgDeleted via WS.

tests: test_delete_message_success - sender deletes, 204, msg excluded from list
test_delete_message_ws_event - MsgDeleted received on WS broadcast

existing_filter.query: WHERE channel_id = ? AND id > ? AND deleted_at IS NULL
